page_subtitle_html: This page mirrors the RWA.xyz Stablecoins view, including headline 30-day (30D) % changes plus Networks and Platforms tables (aggregate stablecoin market cap by chain and by issuer). Level columns are market-cap amounts.
kpi_window_note: All % changes in this row are 30-day (30D) (RWA.xyz). Headline totals from the RWA.xyz Stablecoins Overview.
key_observations_html:
• Stablecoin printed metrics were roughly flat this week: Market Cap near $300.54B (+0.9% 30D) means crypto dollar liquidity did not re-price hard—incremental demand is coming from product and banking-rail headlines rather than a market-cap surge. That keeps the focus on payment rails, reserve quality, and how dollar liquidity reaches on-chain markets.
  • Stablecoin market structure remains concentration-led: leadership is still defined by a small set of large issuers/platforms; share shifts matter as much as aggregate market-cap growth.
  • Industry headlines emphasize Stablecoin policy & reserves Recent coverage includes JPMorgan says Hyperliquid's rise threatens Circle's USDC economics (CoinDesk); Japan’s biggest card network taps Circle to bring stablecoins to 40 million merchants (CoinDesk). Reserve and policy headlines can reprice which stablecoins issuers prioritize—platform concentration on this page may shift before aggregate stablecoin market cap does.
  • Industry headlines emphasize Bank & payments integration Recent coverage includes Binance bets on becoming a crypto 'super app' as stablecoins reshape growth (CoinDesk); Mizuho downgrades Circle to underperform, cuts price target to $50 on Open USD threat (CoinDesk). Bank and payments integration stories usually frame stablecoins as treasury and settlement infrastructure—relevant for institutional use cases beyond exchange trading liquidity.

Context only—not investment advice. Bullets are ranked from on-page data and recent industry headlines (dashboard RSS plus Google News fallback).

Key observations are AI generated and should be reviewed for accuracy.

networks.caption_html: Stablecoins — Networks tab on RWA.xyz Stablecoins. Total Value is aggregate stablecoin market cap on that network (current level); 7-day % change uses the embed field `value_7d_change`. Top-line KPI % changes are typically 30-day (30D).
networks.wide_chart_note_html: The chart lists the top 12 networks by total value (labels include market share). Scroll the table for the full filtered list.
networks.section_intro_html: Networks league — aggregate stablecoin market cap by chain. 7-day % change follows the numeric field from RWA.xyz (see table column help).

platforms.caption_html: Stablecoins — Platforms tab on RWA.xyz Stablecoins. Total Value is issuer-level aggregate market cap (current level). Same 7-day / 30-day conventions as the Networks table above.
platforms.wide_chart_note_html: The chart lists the top 12 platforms by total value (labels include market share). Scroll the table for the full filtered list.
platforms.section_intro_html: Platforms league — issuer-level aggregate stablecoin market cap from RWA.xyz (same 7-day / market share fields as Networks).
